TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Gmarang_kari_utux, title = Gmarang_kari_utux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gmarang_kari_utux} }

S.FORM: = Gmarang Kari utux = Gmarang paah quwaq pusu rudan,pniyahan ta it's sejiq Truku u mnseupu paah mntucing qhuni mi mntucing paah btunux.pusu rudan ta u pllealay balay u pnspuan kingal qhuni mi btunux.smkau qhuni mi smka u btunux, niqan kingal jiyax,smriyu paah qhuni hiya ka kingal Snaw mi kingal Qrijil. msawpu kadhiya du niqan kalaqi mi laqi laqi da.kingal dungal ka Kari u pusu rudan ta u pnaah kingal beyhing balay bling. Balay bi ka quri pniyahan u tkdaya. Tuuda. Truku 3kluwan ni u niqan nanak bqrus utux. Bqrus btunux.suyang dxral ka ini pndka Kari dha. Saw ka was mniq Nyusan Bsuring Qlhangan Skangki ryaxan hidaw mi quri truma Tamunan Bunobung(Bnbung) btnux utux. Btnux bhoway.tasil btnux Mutang) Kika pusu balay pnatas dha. = Pnyahan ppatas = 來源: :Ungay Daki 川心蓮
S.PHON: = gmaɾaŋ kaɾi utux = gmaɾaŋ paaħ quwaq pusu ɾudan,pnijaħan ta it's səɟiq tɾuku u mnsəupu paaħ mntuʦiŋ qħuni mi mntuʦiŋ paaħ btunux.pusu ɾudan ta u plləalaj balaj u pnspuan kiŋal qħuni mi btunux.smkau qħuni mi smka u btunux, niqan kiŋal ɟijax,smɾiju paaħ qħuni ħija ka kiŋal snaw mi kiŋal qɾiɟil. msawpu kadħija du niqan kalaqi mi laqi laqi da.kiŋal duŋal ka kaɾi u pusu ɾudan ta u pnaaħ kiŋal bəħiŋ balaj bliŋ. balaj bi ka quɾi pnijaħan u tkdaja. tuuda. tɾuku *kluwan ni u niqan nanak bqɾus utux. bqɾus btunux.sujaŋ dxɾal ka ini pndka kaɾi dħa. saw ka was mniq njusan bsuɾiŋ qlħaŋan skaŋki ɾjaxan ħidaw mi quɾi tɾuma tamunan bunobuŋ(bnbuŋ) btnux utux. btnux bħowaj.tasil btnux mutaŋ) kika pusu balaj pnatas dħa. = pnjaħan ppatas = **: :uŋaj daki ***
S.FORM: = Gmarang Kari utux = Gmarang paah quwaq pusu rudan,pniyahan ta it's sejiq Truku u mnseupu paah mntucing qhuni mi mntucing paah btunux.pusu rudan ta u pllealay balay u pnspuan kingal qhuni mi btunux.smkau qhuni mi smka u btunux, niqan kingal jiyax,smriyu paah qhuni hiya ka kingal Snaw mi kingal Qrijil. msawpu kadhiya du niqan kalaqi mi laqi laqi da.kingal dungal ka Kari u pusu rudan ta u pnaah kingal beyhing balay bling. Balay bi ka quri pniyahan u tkdaya. Tuuda. Truku 3kluwan ni u niqan nanak bqrus utux. Bqrus btunux.suyang dxral ka ini pndka Kari dha. Saw ka was mniq Nyusan Bsuring Qlhangan Skangki ryaxan hidaw mi quri truma Tamunan Bunobung(Bnbung) btnux utux. Btnux bhoway.tasil btnux Mutang) Kika pusu balay pnatas dha. = Pnyahan ppatas = 來源: :Ungay Daki 川心蓮
S.PHON: = gmaɾaŋ kaɾi utux = gmaɾaŋ paaħ quwaq pusu ɾudan,pnijaħan ta it's səɟiq tɾuku u mnsəupu paaħ mntuʦiŋ qħuni mi mntuʦiŋ paaħ btunux.pusu ɾudan ta u plləalaj balaj u pnspuan kiŋal qħuni mi btunux.smkau qħuni mi smka u btunux, niqan kiŋal ɟijax,smɾiju paaħ qħuni ħija ka kiŋal snaw mi kiŋal qɾiɟil. msawpu kadħija du niqan kalaqi mi laqi laqi da.kiŋal duŋal ka kaɾi u pusu ɾudan ta u pnaaħ kiŋal bəħiŋ balaj bliŋ. balaj bi ka quɾi pnijaħan u tkdaja. tuuda. tɾuku *kluwan ni u niqan nanak bqɾus utux. bqɾus btunux.sujaŋ dxɾal ka ini pndka kaɾi dħa. saw ka was mniq njusan bsuɾiŋ qlħaŋan skaŋki ɾjaxan ħidaw mi quɾi tɾuma tamunan bunobuŋ(bnbuŋ) btnux utux. btnux bħowaj.tasil btnux mutaŋ) kika pusu balaj pnatas dħa. = pnjaħan ppatas = **: :uŋaj daki ***
